narrative:
Smith Twp township has 1,986 registered voters, with 61.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.3 percentage points.
